Meet Charlotte

Built from heart, purpose & love

I'm Charlotte — mum to Laila (15) and Belle (2), the two souls who inspired the name and the reason I do everything I do. LailaBelle's was born from a deeply personal place: a desire to be present for my girls, to help others feel good in their bodies, and to build something I'm truly proud of.

"I know what it's like to feel unhappy in your own body. That journey led me to this work — to walk alongside people, help them regain confidence, and celebrate their wins as if they were my own."

I spent six years working in mental health before founding LailaBelle's. Every client reminds me why I started. Every transformation strengthens me. This is where purpose meets passion — and I'm so grateful you're here.

What I Offer

Treatments designed
for real results

Book via WhatsApp
01
Laser Lipolysis

Non-invasive low-level laser technology that targets stubborn fat cells beneath the skin. Comfortable, relaxing, and zero downtime. Ideal for the abdomen, thighs, hips and arms.

20–40 min · No downtime
02
Ultrasonic Fat Cavitation

Low-frequency sound waves break apart stubborn fat cells, which your body then naturally eliminates. Feels like a warm massage. Visible results often from the first session.

20–40 min · No downtime
03
Radio Frequency Skin Tightening

Gently heats the deeper layers of skin to stimulate collagen and elastin production. Firms, tones and tightens — like a hot stone massage for your skin. Pairs perfectly with fat reduction treatments.

20–45 min · No downtime
04
Luxury Facials

Tailored facial treatments that leave your skin refreshed, hydrated and glowing. Charlotte takes the time to understand your skin type and deliver a truly luxurious experience from start to finish.

60 min · Deeply relaxing
05
Massage & Body Treatments

From lymphatic drainage to targeted body massage, designed to support your body's natural processes, reduce heaviness in the legs and leave you feeling rejuvenated and restored.

Bespoke · Restorative
✦
Pay Your Way

Invest in yourself now, pay later. LailaBelle's accepts Klarna and Clearpay so you can start your journey without the wait.

Klarna · Clearpay · Card
